notes: First-contact visibility check: after one trivial turn the dashboard shows WHICH model the session runs and HOW FULL its context is. aider writes both into the watched .aider.chat.history.md: the '> Model: gpt-5-nano …' announce line (modelRE → ModelName) and '> Tokens: …' usage lines (→ TotalTokens); ComputeContextUtilization resolves gpt-5-nano in the LiteLLM capacity table (context_window 272000, verified at record time), so utilization > 0. The phase DSL asserts the state arc; the model assertion is evidenced by the staged-replay golden AFTER turn_end (summary.model_name = gpt-5-nano — the ~/.aider.conf.yml default; older openai/-prefixed regression slugs would NOT resolve, per the cell assessment caveat).

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = gpt-5-nano (the conf default, not 'unknown') and context utilization > 0 (window 272000 from the capacity table)
